summary: Top‑notch audience tape captures a stellar set with an extended Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain jam, thunderous drums and a high‑energy ’Round & ’Round → Johnny B. Goode finale.
review: The Mason B. Taylor audience recording is praised as top‑notch, delivering clear sound and especially powerful drum presence. Musically the show shines with a soaring Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain stretch, a relaxed ‘Wheel out of Space’ jam, an electrifying ’Round & ’Round > Johnny B. Goode closing, and a perfect Uncle John’s Band encore.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; it highlights strong musical performance and good audience recording quality, leading to an overall four‑star rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience (AUD) tape described as top‑notch with clear instrument separation and thunderous drums; no major flaws noted.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: Set flows smoothly from an extended Scarlet jam into a relaxed Wheel piece, builds energy with ’Round & ’Round > JBG, and caps off the night with a classic Uncle John’s Band encore.

band_member_comments.Drums: Drums described as thunderous and a highlight of the performance.
